data.name: Orc Bastion
data.detailed_description:
Orc Bastion is a gay adult bara JRPG with a turn-based battle mode. Join forces with orcs, trolls and demons and defeat the Demon Lord who bound your soul to the orc warrior Rok. Please and pleasure your monstrous allies and masters to become stronger and face an ancient evil together.

Explore a fantasy world with your allies, friends and masters

Exploration pays off -- treasures, equipment and useful items as well as new allies are waiting to be found. Some of the big fellas you meet may also want to have some fun with you. Pleasure them and grow stronger!

Pleasure men and monsters alike

Your allies and masters come in all sorts of sizes and shapes. Serve them well, little human!

Your soul belongs to the orc Rok. He's your Master and knows exactly what you need.

Get intimitate with your team and help them with their problems to get an additonal ending sequence with them.

Fight, explore, climb, swim...

Items, skills, valuables and new masters are waiting to be discovered. Exploring your surroundings will often be benefitial.

Battle monsters in strategic battles that trigger seamlessly.

Hit enemy weaknesses to gain additional turns and to delay their next turn. Placement matters -- spread out, get behind enemies, attack from above. Use elemental attacks and weapon types to your advantage.

Features

  • A classic JRPG game -- field & dungeon exploration, seamless turn-based battles and a world map

  • Find new Masters to join you in Rok's Fort and let serving them make you stronger

  • Learn new battle skills, find and buy new equipment and level up your characters

  • Gameplay inspired by 90s console RPG games

  • A turn-based battle mode with up to 3 party members where character placement and terrain matters

  • Optional side quests for your party members

  • Over 40 adult scenes with dominant men, orcs, trolls, kobolds and other monstrous buff fantasy dudes

  • Around 14 hours of gameplay and three difficulty modes

  • Optional bosses and hidden locations

  • Play with the original pixel-like look or optional higher-resolution graphics

  • A quest radar to see where to go next to progress side quests and the main story

data.short_description: Orc Bastion is a 3d adult gay bara JRPG with turn-based battles. Join forces with the orc Rok, find new allies and monstrous friends to please and pleasure and fight turn-based battles to stop Demon Lord Falgar.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 x64 or higher
  • 處理器: 2 GHz / Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 4000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 750 or comparable
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 8000 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 3 GHz / Quad Core
  • 顯示卡: GTX 970 or comparable
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 9000 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
